_comment: Agent-facing compensation workflow. Each action is a Directus MANUAL flow triggered via POST /flows/trigger/{id} with body { collection: 'compensation_requests', keys: [<requestId>] }. The portal is a THIN trigger surface — one click = one flow run, NO inputs (all logic, incl. any coupon form / Yiji CreateCoupon call, lives in the Directus flow). Flow IDs are identical in production and the local clone (preserved on purpose) so the portal is environment-agnostic — it targets VITE_DIRECTUS_URL. Local stand-in flows perform only the status transition, no external calls. `key` values map to standin-flows.mjs's PAYLOAD table; do not rename without updating it.

actions.label: Calculate compensation
actions.effect: status -> Calculating Compensation; fills request_frequency + suggested_compensation_value

actions.label: Generate coupon
actions.effect: status -> Generating Coupon; sets coupon_code (PROD: calls Yiji CreateCoupon, creates Com_Coupons row, links it)

actions.label: Assign coupon
actions.effect: status -> Assign Coupon to User; links the coupon to the request

actions.label: Reject
actions.effect: status -> Rejected; stamps declined_at (PROD flow captures a reason)

actions.label: Close task
actions.effect: status -> Closed (this is the portal's 'Close task' button)
